summary: Investigate quality issues, perform root cause analysis, and develop corrective and preventive action plans to reduce defects.

inputs.name: quality_data
inputs.description: Defect rates, scrap costs, rework data, and customer complaints by product and period.

inputs.name: process_data
inputs.description: Process parameters, SPC data, and capability indices for affected operations.

inputs.name: specification_requirements
inputs.description: Product specifications, acceptance criteria, and applicable standards.

outputs.name: root_cause_analysis
outputs.description: Validated root causes for top quality issues with evidence.

outputs.name: corrective_action_plan
outputs.description: Corrective and preventive actions with owners, timelines, and expected impact.

outputs.name: quality_baseline
outputs.description: Current defect rates, cost of quality, and capability indices.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is quality improvement, not product liability or financial analysis.
Require quality data and process data before root cause analysis.
Output must include root cause analysis, corrective action plan, and quality baseline.

steps.action: Check quality and process data for completeness and accuracy.
Calculate current defect rates, cost of quality, and capability indices.
Perform structured root cause analysis for top quality issues.
Design corrective and preventive actions with validation plan.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read quality data, process records, and specifications.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save the root cause analysis and corrective action plan.

verification.method: Check that root causes are supported by evidence.
Check that corrective actions have owners, timelines, and expected impact.
Check that current quality metrics are documented.

success_criteria: Root causes are validated with evidence, not assumptions.
Corrective actions are specific with owners and timelines.
Current quality baseline is documented with metrics.

rollback.when: If the analysis uses incomplete quality data or invents root causes, roll back to verified inputs.
